description: Drawing demonstrates how to use a union type (Shape) in a struct. The Shapes field will accept any type that implements the Shape interface that has been registered in the schema.go file.

title.description: Title is the name of the drawing.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is when the drawing was created.. Must be an RFC3339 formatted date-time string (e.g., "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z07:00")

shapes.description: Shapes is a direct slice of the registered Shape union.

radius.description: Radius is the distance from the center to the edge.

color.description: Color is an optional display color.
Color is an optional display color.

base.description: Base is the length of the base.

height.description: Height is the height from the base to the opposite vertex.

color.description: Color is an optional display color.
